BookshelfKeyVaultProperties.description: Key Vault Properties with clientId selection

identityClientId.description: The client ID of the identity to use for accessing the Key Vault. Must be a workload identity assigned to the Bookshelf resource.

keyName.description: The Key Name in Key Vault

keyVersion.description: The Key Version in Key Vault

customerManagedKeys.description: Whether or not to use a customer managed key when encrypting data at rest

keyVaultProperties.description: The key to use for encrypting data at rest when customer managed keys are enabled. Required if Customer Managed Keys is enabled.

logAnalyticsClusterId.description: The Log Analytics Cluster to use for debug logs. This is required when Customer Managed Keys are enabled.

privateEndpointSubnetId.description: Private Endpoint Subnet ID for private endpoint connections.

publicNetworkAccess.description: Whether or not public network access is allowed for this resource. For security reasons, it is recommended to disable it whenever possible.

searchSubnetId.description: Search Subnet ID for search resources.

workloadIdentities.description: User assigned identity IDs to be used by knowledgebase workloads. The key value must be the resource ID of the identity resource.

ChatModelDeploymentProperties.description: Defines a deployment binding a specific model family to a user-defined deployment name for chat inference.

modelFormat.description: Model format as published by the provider. Verify supported formats per region using the Model Catalog API.

modelName.description: Canonical provider model name available in the selected region. Verify supported values per region using the Model Catalog API.

Identity.description: For user assigned identity resource property.

id.description: The resource ID of the user assigned identity.

keyName.description: The Key Name in Key Vault

keyVersion.description: The Key Version in Key Vault

scaleSetPriority.description: The Virtual Machine Scale Set priority. If not specified, the default is 'Regular'.

vmSize.description: The size of the underlying Azure VM.

PrivateEndpointConnectionProperties.description: Properties of the private endpoint connection.

privateLinkServiceConnectionState.description: A collection of information about the state of the connection between service consumer and provider.

PrivateLinkServiceConnectionState.description: A collection of information about the state of the connection between service consumer and provider.

actionsRequired.description: A message indicating if changes on the service provider require any updates on the consumer.

description.description: The reason for approval/rejection of the connection.

status.description: Indicates whether the connection has been Approved/Rejected/Removed by the owner of the service.

behaviorPreferences.description: Default preferences to guide AI behaviors in this project.

path.description: The path to the data within its parent container. This should be relative to the root of the parent container.

StorageStore.description: An abstract representation of storage store kind.

netAppVolumeId.description: The associated Azure NetApp Files volume ID.

storageAccountId.description: The associated Azure Storage Account ID.

SupercomputerIdentities.description: Dictionary of identity properties for the Supercomputer.

kubeletIdentity.description:
Kubelet identity ID used by the supercomputer.
      This identity is used by the supercomputer at node level to access Azure resources.
      This identity must have ManagedIdentityOperator role on the clusterIdentity.

workloadIdentities.description: User assigned identity IDs to be used by workloads as federated credentials running on supercomputer. The key value must be the resource ID of the identity resource.

customerManagedKeys.description: Whether or not to use a customer managed key when encrypting data at rest

diskEncryptionSetId.description: Disk Encryption Set ID to use for Customer Managed Keys encryption. Required if Customer Managed Keys is enabled.

logAnalyticsClusterId.description: The Log Analytics Cluster to use for debug logs. This is required when Customer Managed Keys are enabled.

managementSubnetId.description:
System Subnet ID associated with AKS apiserver. Must be delegated to Microsoft.ContainerService/managedClusters.
    It should have connectivity to the system subnet and nodepool subnets.

outboundType.description:
Network egress type provisioned for the supercomputer workloads.
    Defaults to LoadBalancer if not specified.
    If None is specified, the customer is responsible for providing outbound connectivity for Supercomputer functionality.

subnetId.description:
System Subnet ID associated with managed NodePool for system resources.
    It should have connectivity to the child NodePool subnets.

systemSku.description: The SKU to use for the system node pool.

definitionContent.description: The JSON content for defining a resource

version.description: The version of a resource definition

agentSubnetId.description: Agent Subnet ID for agent resources.

customerManagedKeys.description: Whether or not to use a customer managed key when encrypting data at rest

keyVaultProperties.description: The key to use for encrypting data at rest when customer managed keys are enabled.

logAnalyticsClusterId.description: The Log Analytics Cluster to use for debug logs. This is required when Customer Managed Keys are enabled.

privateEndpointSubnetId.description: Private Endpoint Subnet ID for private endpoint connections.

publicNetworkAccess.description: Whether or not public network access is allowed for this resource. For security reasons, it is recommended to disable it whenever possible.

workspaceIdentity.description: Identity IDs used for leveraging Workspace resources.

workspaceSubnetId.description: Function Subnet ID for workspace resources.
